title: Ender Pearl Creation
description: A simple but effective mod, which allows crafting ender pearls
body:
A simple but effective mod, which allows crafting ender pearls

Add a new mineral (EnderCrystalOre)

and a new object (EnderFragment) with which you can create an ender pearl.

the aforementioned mineral is located between layers 10 and 15 of the outside world.
